## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run package`
- [ ] `git diff --exit-code -- dist/index.js`
- [ ] Documentation, schemas, and examples updated when applicable
- [ ] No credentials, tenant data, or confidential definitions included
